scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); if(!fs.existsSync('frontend/node_modules/react-scripts')){ console.log('Frontend node_modules missing or incomplete. Installing dependencies...'); const pnpm=process.platform==='win32'?'pnpm.cmd':'pnpm'; cp.execSync(pnpm+' --dir frontend install', {stdio:'inherit'}); } const run=(args)=>process.platform==='win32'?cp.spawn('cmd.exe', ['/c', 'pnpm '+args.join(' ')], {stdio:'inherit'}):cp.spawn('pnpm', args, {stdio:'inherit', shell:true}); run(['run', 'start:backend']); run(['run', 'start:frontend']);"
scripts.start:backend: python3 backend/manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 || python backend/manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 || (echo Error: Python is not installed. Please install Python. && exit 1)
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && (../.venv/bin/python manage.py test customer || ..\\.venv\\Scripts\\python manage.py test customer || ../.venv/Scripts/python manage.py test customer || python manage.py test customer)
